title: roofing.claim extension
description: v0 DRAFT. Exemplar vertical extension: the insurance claim attached to a roofing project, carried as extensions["roofing.claim"] on Project and as the claim object in roofing.claim.status_changed events. Extension schemas are owned by the vertical and versioned with the vertical's extension docs; core consumers treat them as opaque. RECONCILE(doc-04/05): claim status set and supplement fields against AccuLynx's insurance/supplements module.

status.description: Claim lifecycle status (roofing-vertical enum, may evolve with the vertical's extension version).

date_of_loss.description: Calendar date of the loss event (no time component).
